description:
Designed, developed, and deployed cloud-native backend solutions to support claims processing
workflows for the VA Health System using AWS services.
•
Implemented and maintained serverless architectures using AWS Lambda (Python), API Gateway, and
Step Functions to streamline claims adjudication and automation logic.
•
Interacted with Amazon RDS (PostgreSQL) for secure data storage, manipulation, and retrieval of
sensitive claims and healthcare records.
•
Refactored and optimized backend workflows for different types of claims, ensuring efficient processing,
reduced latency, and improved system reliability.
•
• Secured applications with OAuth2, JWT authentication, and OpenID Connect, enhancing data protection.
Monitored backend service performance using AWS CloudWatch, implementing proactive alerting and
logging strategies to ensure high availability.
•
Collaborated cross-functionally with DevSecOps, QA, and healthcare stakeholders to refine backend
system requirements and align delivery with mission-critical goals.
•
• Collaborated in an Agile environment, refining user stories to ensure clarity and testability.

Designed, developed, and optimized microservices using Java, Python, Node.js, and Go on AWS, ensuring
high performance and scalability.
•
Built and maintained RESTful APIs using Spring Boot, implementing Swagger documentation, and API
versioning.
•
Professional Summary
Work History
Secured APIs by implementing OAuth2, JWT authentication, and OpenID Connect, enhancing access
control, and data protection.
•
Automated DynamoDB table population and management with Python scripts, efficiently handling CRUD
operations, data integrity, and dynamic updates.
•
Developed and optimized CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, automating build, test, and deployment processes
for faster, and more reliable releases.
•
Created comprehensive technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, and
user guides, ensuring seamless knowledge transfer.
•
Worked in an Agile environment, practicing paired programming, continuous integration, and iterative
development for rapid feature delivery.
•
Provided production support, investigating system anomalies, analyzing logs, troubleshooting issues, and
resolving customer-reported incidents efficiently.
•
Collaborated cross-functionally with product managers, designers, and engineers to translate business
needs into scalable technical solutions.
